merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established and the American Embassy opened in Leopoldville (now Kinshasa) with John D. Tomlinson as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, coinciding with Congolese independence.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on June 30, 1960, when the American Embassy in Leopoldville (now Kinshasha) was established with John D. Tomlinson as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the establishment of diplomatic relations and opening of the American Embassy in Leopoldville on 1960-06-30.
